footer.site: {site} · data is recorded in the central {short} system.

meta.saranDesc: Submit suggestions, critique, or appreciation regarding {university} services.
meta.whistleblowerDesc: Official channel to report ethics violations, corruption, harassment, and academic misconduct at {university}.
meta.lacakDesc: Track the status of your {short} whistleblower report by Case ID.
meta.terimakasihDesc: Your whistleblower report was successfully submitted. Save your Case ID.
meta.reportUnitsDesc: Manage the list of faculties and study programs shown on the {site} ({university}) form.

home.title: Voice your feedback for
home.intro: Pick the channel that fits. Suggestions & critique for service feedback, or Whistleblower for serious misconduct reports. Your identity is protected — anonymous option is available on both channels.
home.saranDescr: Share feedback on academic, non-academic, and infrastructure services across all {short} faculties & units.
home.saranBullet1: Suitable for appreciation, critique, & improvement ideas
home.saranBullet2: With identity or anonymous — your choice
home.saranBullet3: Required to choose the relevant faculty / program
home.wbDescr: Report serious misconduct: corruption / gratification, violence / harassment, academic fraud, conflict of interest, or staff conduct violations.
home.wbBullet1: Anonymous by default — identity is optional
home.wbBullet2: Each report receives a Case ID for follow-up
home.wbBullet3: Report access restricted to internal staff
home.trustAnonimDescr: Available on both channels with no IP tracking.
home.trustTrackDescr: Status & public notes can be tracked via Case ID.
home.lacakBoxDescr: Track your report status using the Case ID you received after submitting.

saranPage.title: Send Suggestions & Critique
saranPage.intro: Your feedback will be reviewed by the {short} team to help improve the quality of academic, non-academic, and infrastructure services across all faculties & units. Your identity is protected — anonymous option available.

saranForm.tentangTitle: Tell us a little about yourself
saranForm.tentangDescr: This information helps us sort feedback from different groups within the academic community.
saranForm.lainnyaDescr: Specify your role in the field that appears
saranForm.noUnits: No units listed yet. Ask the admin to fill the Units tab in the spreadsheet.
saranForm.privasiDescr: Identifying yourself is optional and kept confidential. Choose how you would like to submit your feedback.
saranForm.withIdentitasDescr: The {short} team can reach out for clarification or follow-up updates.
saranForm.anonimDescr: Your identity is not recorded. Suitable for sensitive feedback.
saranForm.anonActiveDescr: Name and ID will not be requested. We still appreciate it if you include a contact (optional) in the next step for follow-up confirmation without revealing your identity.
saranForm.masukanDescr: Write your feedback, suggestions, critique, or complaints regarding {short} academic, non-academic, and infrastructure services.
saranForm.masukanPlaceholder: Share what you would like to evaluate or propose…
saranForm.masukanMin: Write at least 10 characters so it can be acted upon.
saranForm.kronologiPlaceholder: Describe the sequence of events or supporting context — when, where, who was involved.
saranForm.kontakLabel: Phone / WhatsApp number for follow-up confirmation
saranForm.tinjauDescr: Please review the summary of your feedback. Once submitted, the data will be recorded in the {short} system.
saranForm.submitDisclaimer: By pressing the Send Feedback button, you confirm that the information provided is true and may be used by {university} as a basis for service quality improvement.
saranForm.successDescr: Feedback from {name} has been received and will be considered for improving the quality of {university} services.
saranForm.errNamaWajib: Name is required if not anonymous.
saranForm.errMasukanMin: Feedback must be at least 10 characters to be actionable.
saranForm.errKirim: Failed to send. Please try again shortly.
saranForm.roleDosenDescr: Permanent or contract teaching staff / academics.
saranForm.roleMahasiswaDescr: Active enrolled undergraduate, master, or doctoral students.

whistleblowerPage.title: Report misconduct via the {wb} channel.
whistleblowerPage.intro: This channel is reserved for reporting suspected ethics violations, corruption, harassment, academic fraud, and staff conduct violations at {university}. The reporter's identity is protected.
whistleblowerPage.altLine_pre: For ordinary feedback / service improvement suggestions, please use

whistleblowerForm.disclaimerBody: The reporter's identity (if a name is provided) is protected and only accessible to the University Ethics Committee / SPI team. Knowingly false reports may result in ethical / legal sanctions per applicable regulations.
whistleblowerForm.anonimDescr: Your identity is not included. The team only receives the report.
whistleblowerForm.identitasDescr: The team can contact you for clarification. Still confidential.
whistleblowerForm.pihakHelp: Write what you know — initials / position only is fine.
whistleblowerForm.detailPlaceholder: What happened? Be as clear as possible.
whistleblowerForm.kronologiPlaceholder: When, where, sequence of events. Note any photo / document / witness evidence (optional).
whistleblowerForm.kronologiHelp: File evidence (photos / documents) can be sent later to the admin email along with the Case ID you receive after submitting.
whistleblowerForm.agree: I declare that the information I have reported here is true and can be accounted for. I understand that false reports may have ethical / legal consequences.
whistleblowerForm.afterCaseId: After submitting, you will receive a Case ID — keep it safe for follow-up.
whistleblowerForm.errNamaWajib: Name is required if you choose to be identified.
whistleblowerForm.errDetailMin: Report detail must be at least {min} characters.
whistleblowerForm.errSetuju: You must agree to the truthfulness statement.

lacak.title: Track your report status
lacak.intro: Enter the Case ID you received after submitting your report. You will see the latest status & public notes from the admin. Report details remain confidential.
lacak.errEmpty: Please enter a Case ID first.
lacak.errFormat: Invalid Case ID format. Example: WB-20260509-A4F1.
lacak.notFoundHelp: Make sure you copied the Case ID exactly as shown after submitting your report, including capitalization and dashes.
lacak.catatanEmpty: No public note yet. Please check back later.
lacak.privacyNote: For security, the report content, reporter identity, and contact info are not shown on this page even when the Case ID matches.
lacak.lupaDescr: The Case ID is shown only once after submitting your report (format: WB-YYYYMMDD-XXXX). If you lost the code, contact the admin at admin email explaining roughly when the report was submitted.

Diterima.label: Received
Diterima.description: Your report has entered the system and is awaiting initial verification by the admin.

Sedang ditindaklanjuti.label: In progress
Sedang ditindaklanjuti.description: The admin has verified the report and is currently following up. Please wait for the next update.

Selesai.label: Completed
Selesai.description: Follow-up on this report has concluded. See the public note below for a summary of the outcome.

Ditolak / Tidak relevan.label: Rejected / Not relevant
Ditolak / Tidak relevan.description: The report could not be acted upon for certain reasons (e.g., out of scope, insufficient data). See the public note for details.

terimakasih.title: Report submitted successfully
terimakasih.intro: Thank you for your courage in reporting suspected misconduct. The {short} Ethics Committee / SPI team will follow up on this report per procedure. The reporter's identity (if provided) is kept confidential.
terimakasih.saveCaseIdPre: Save this Case ID. You can monitor your report status anytime on the
terimakasih.savedNote: Your report is stored in the internal {university} system and only accessible to the team authorized to handle whistleblower cases. No automatic notifications are sent to other parties.

adminLogin.title: Recap Admin Panel
adminLogin.footer: Access restricted to {short} staff. Contact the system admin if you forgot the password.

adminReport.wbHint: The whistleblower channel is active. The "Whistleblower" tab in the spreadsheet will be created automatically when the first report comes in.
adminReport.relaxFilter: Try loosening the filter or reset.
adminReport.publicNotePlaceholder: E.g., Team contacted reporter via WA on May 12. Investigation in progress.

adminUnits.title: Faculties & Study Programs
adminUnits.intro: Add, edit, or deactivate units shown on the public form. Data is stored in the Units tab of the Google Spreadsheet. Changes appear in the public form within ~1 minute (server-side cache).
adminUnits.seedConfirm: Fill the Units tab with the default Universitas Gajayana Malang list? This only runs if the tab is empty.
adminUnits.seedAlreadyFilled: The Units tab already has data. Nothing was added.
adminUnits.fakultasPlaceholder: e.g., FACULTY OF ENGINEERING AND INFORMATICS
adminUnits.addHelp: Leave the Program field empty for a faculty-level entry (e.g., dean's office services). Smaller order numbers appear first — use multiples of 10 to make insertion easy.
adminUnits.noUnitsHint: Click Seed default UNIGA Malang for a quick seed, or add manually using the form above.
adminUnits.deleteConfirm: Delete unit "{name}"? This action is permanent.
